id: aug24-5
name: [N] Simple Daily Activities That Changed My Life
technique: list
platforms: [linkedin]
tags: [daily-routine, listicle, attainable, lifestyle, best-days]
source_month: "2024-08"
---

## Why It Works

People just love routines, especially if they are attainable and focused on the right things. This would have failed if it would have been made impossible to achieve. Make sure if you write something like this, it resonates with your target audience.

## Template

There are [NUMBER] simple daily activities that changed my life.
(and may change yours)

1. [ACTIVITY 1]
2. [ACTIVITY 2]
3. [ACTIVITY 3]
4. [ACTIVITY 4]
5. [ACTIVITY 5]
6. [ACTIVITY 6]
7. [ACTIVITY 7]
8. [ACTIVITY 8]

My best days as a [PROFESSION/ROLE] have all [NUMBER].
I call this '[CONCEPT NAME]'.

What do your best days look like?

## Example

There are 8 simple daily activities that changed my college life.
(and may change yours)

1. A morning study session
2. A balanced breakfast
3. Active participation in classes
4. 2 hours of focused project work
5. 30 minutes of physical activity
6. Time with study group
7. A campus club meeting
8. Mindfulness practice before bed

My best days as a student have all 8.
I call this 'academic-life balance'.

What do your best days on campus look like?
